subject: [For JH, Ian Approval] [PHCB] Ads Auto Escrow Top Up
deck_filename: Shopee Mobile Mail - [For Vincent Approval] [CB] Ads Auto Escrow Top Up.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Jianghong, Ian,

We would like to seek your approval for PHCB to proceed with ads auto
escrow top up with seller consent prior to opt in.

Background: In Feb 2026, the CN government tightened the
implementation of stricter
online platform and antitrust rules, creating potential compliance risks.
In light of this, PH’s plan to auto opt in all sellers into the auto escrow
top up feature could violate these new regulations which prohibits
auto-enrollment in any program where sellers will incur additional costs.

Proposal: Initially planned for mid-March 2026 roll out, we will delay
PHCB’s implementation to June 2026. This will give us enough time to change
UI design for CNCB where we will explicitly need sellers’ consent prior to
opting them in.

Impact: Assuming lower adoption due to this change, we expect ads revenue
to be lower than what we currently have budgeted. FY26 PHCB ads rev will be
lower by -$578k (-0.03% of CB GMV, -0.004% of PLT GMV).

Attached is Vincent's approval on the proposal. For any questions, please

Thank you,

Kevin

content.question:
Background: In Feb 2026, the CN government tightened the
implementation of stricter
online platform and antitrust rules, creating potential compliance risks.
In light of this, PH’s plan to auto opt in all sellers into the auto escrow
top up feature could violate these new regulations which prohibits
auto-enrollment in any program where sellers will incur additional costs.

On this, are we referring to charging?

or utilizing of the ads on their
behalf?

content.answer:
Opt in option won't help with take rate. If PH really wants to help with
take rate, why cannot we just do the fee structure like other markets?

Opt in option won't help with take rate. If PH really wants to help with
take rate, why cannot we just do the fee structure like other markets?

Hi Jianghong and Ian,

Apologies for the late reply. *We are revisiting our plan with advice from
the CN MKT, CN Legal and Ads product teams. *

   - *PH already started the "auto-escrow" approach since February* of this
   year. Most CB sellers have already been on auto-escrow. (We did it batch by
   batch, so the remaining coverage and TR impact are small).
   - To switch to another mechanism adopted by other markets, *we likely
   need to first roll back the auto-escrow, and wait for a grace period*.

We are in close discussion with the teams mentioned above and will provide
a further update when we can confirm the steps and timeline.

On Wed, Apr 8, 2026 at 11:59 AM Jianghong Liu <jianghong.liu@shopee.com>
